item.title: Ilana Glazer Live!
item.description:
Tuesday, June 23, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: 713 Music Hall, 401 Franklin Street, Houston, TX

Doors: 6:00 PM Show: 7:00 PM Ages: All Ages **All support acts are subject to change without notice** To reduce staff contact with guest belongings, we have implemented the following bag policy: Bags up to 12" x 6" x 12" are allowed in the venue. All bags will be searched prior to entry. Bags that are not clear will be subject to additional search. Doors: 6:00 PM Show: 7:00 PM Ages: All Ages **All support acts are subject to change without notice** To reduce staff contact with guest belongings, we have implemented the following bag policy: Bags up to 12" x 6" x 12" are allowed in the venue. All bags will be searched prior to entry. Bags that are not clear will be subject to additional search.
